title: ChromaDB
wikilinks: Copilot Session Checkpoint: Fixing MemPalace Timeouts
Copilot Session Checkpoint: MemPalace Phase 3-4 and AutoAgent Research
summary: ChromaDB is a vector database used by MemPalace for semantic search and storage of raw verbatim exchanges. It enables efficient retrieval of conversational and project data based on similarity and metadata filtering.
